name: Audit Page Real Data
objective: Replace hardcoded audit log entries in audit/index.vue with real data read from vault/shared/audit/*.md via a new API route.
exit_criteria: GET /api/vault/audit-notes returns real ReadModelAuditNote[] from the vault, sorted by createdAt desc.
app/pages/audit/index.vue fetches from /api/vault/audit-notes — no hardcoded logs array remains.
vault/shared/audit/ contains at least 2 seed files that are parsed correctly by the read model.
bun test passes with no new failures after all 3 subtasks are done.
